Title: Create "after the feast" scenarios with random goal
Description:
'Create "after the feast" scenarios with random goal:
- [x] Single robot, NAMO, no reset
- [x] Single robot, NAMO, with reset
- [ ] Single robot, SNAMO, no reset
- [ ] Single robot, SNAMO, with reset
- [ ] Multi robot, NAMO, no reset
- [ ] Multi robot, NAMO, with reset
- [ ] Multi robot, SNAMO, no reset
- [ ] Multi robot, SNAMO, with reset
Author: RENAULT Benoit
Milestone: Improve simulations robustness with random goals and start poses

Title: Improve Logging
Description:
'Save in experiment log folder:
- [ ] simulation parameters in a JSON file
- [ ] initial world state in a JSON+SVG file pair
- [ ] world state after each goal being reached
- [ ] all successive world states (in a new SVG layer add moved entity's polygon with a border of same color as filling but no filling)
Author: RENAULT Benoit
Milestone: Improve simulations robustness with random goals and start poses

Title: Add "reached goals" metrics in experiment log
Description:
'Use log "goal_status" attribute to compute new metrics at the end of simulation :
- [ ] number of reached goals
- [ ] total number of goals
- [ ] percentage of reached goals over total number
Author: RENAULT Benoit
Milestone: Improve simulations robustness with random goals and start poses

Title: Add random start pose generation
Description: If parameter is simulation file set to true, generate random start pose (generate as many as there are goals if reset is activated between goals !).
Author: RENAULT Benoit
Milestone: Improve simulations robustness with random goals and start poses

Title: Add aggregation metrics for all robots
Description:
'Add metrics for :
- [ ] transit path length
- [ ] transfer path length
- [ ] total path length
- [ ] transfer percentage
- [ ] transit transfer ratio
- [ ] number of transferred obstacles
- [ ] number of reallocated obstacles
Author: RENAULT Benoit
Milestone: Improve simulations robustness with random goals and start poses
